name: @robbin-io/import-export-framework
description: A cross-runtime TypeScript streaming import/export framework.

scripts.build: node --max-old-space-size=4096 ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b packages/core packages/codec-jsonl packages/source-memory packages/sink-memory packages/node packages/browser packages/source-file packages/sink-file packages/codec-csv packages/plugin-testing packages/transform-fields packages/validation-zod
scripts.package:check: npm run build && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-public-api-surface.mjs && node scripts/check-release-docs.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --max-old-space-size=4096 ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b --pretty false packages/core packages/codec-jsonl packages/source-memory packages/sink-memory packages/node packages/browser packages/source-file packages/sink-file packages/codec-csv packages/plugin-testing packages/transform-fields packages/validation-zod
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:api && npm run build && npm run package:check && npm run package:tarballs:check && npm run changeset:check-config && npm run smoke:node-dist && npm run smoke:packed-consumer && npm run example:browser:build && npm run smoke:browser-csv && npm run smoke:browser-csv-worker && npm run smoke:browser-writable-stream && npm run smoke:browser-worker
